name: 5 Star Credit & Financial Svcs, LLC
description_short: Charlotte-based credit repair firm led by licensed Realtor Chemise 'Star' Broadus, offering personalized dispute services and homeownership coaching nationwide.
description_long:
5 Star Credit & Financial Svcs, LLC is a Charlotte, North Carolina-based credit repair firm operated by Chemise "Star" Broadus, a consumer credit specialist and licensed Realtor in both North Carolina and South Carolina. The company claims 8-plus years in business and over 20 years of industry experience, operating out of a suite office on Monroe Road in Charlotte. Unlike traditional credit repair firms, 5 Star also functions within a network marketing organization — Broadus holds a Vice President rank within an unnamed parent company and leads a team described as hundreds of entrepreneurs. The firm serves clients across all 50 states, primarily through virtual consultations booked via Calendly, with limited in-person hours Tuesday through Saturday.

The process begins with a scheduled consultation to assess the client's credit situation. The firm then reviews credit reports and pursues disputes on derogatory items — including collections, charge-offs, bankruptcies, and evictions — across the credit bureaus. Creditor negotiation, credit rebuilding strategies, and general debt management guidance round out the core offering. Broadus's dual licensure as both a credit repair specialist and an active Realtor allows her to guide clients from remediation through an actual home purchase, providing end-to-end support that most standalone credit repair firms cannot offer.

The combination of credit repair expertise and active real estate licensure under one practitioner is the firm's most meaningful differentiator. For clients whose primary goal is homeownership, working with someone who understands both credit qualification thresholds and property transactions eliminates a significant handoff gap that typically exists between these two professional services. The firm markets itself on personalized, relationship-based service — a deliberate contrast to large automated platforms — and a 4.9-star Google rating from 112 reviews provides credible evidence that clients value this hands-on approach. The owner's personal story, from educator to six-figure credit repair professional, is central to the brand's appeal and marketing.

On the positive side, 5 Star carries a strong client satisfaction record, a genuinely differentiated dual-service model, and demonstrated results for clients pursuing mortgage readiness. However, the firm's pricing is entirely opaque — no monthly fees, setup costs, or service tiers are disclosed publicly, making direct cost comparisons impossible before a consultation. The network marketing structure is the most significant transparency concern: the parent MLM company is never identified on the website, and the business simultaneously sells consumer credit services and recruits new entrepreneurs into the same structure. There is no BBB profile or accreditation, no mobile app or client portal, and virtually no presence on independent review platforms beyond Google. Consumers who prioritize fee transparency, third-party accreditation, and structural clarity should ask direct questions about these areas before signing up.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.
pros: Exceptional Google rating of 4.9/5 from 112 verified reviews
Owner is a licensed Realtor in NC and SC, enabling end-to-end homeownership support
Serves clients in all 50 states via virtual consultations
Personalized, owner-led service rather than a faceless automated platform
Covers a broad range of derogatory items including bankruptcies, collections, and evictions
Claimed 20-plus years of consumer finance and credit industry experience
cons: No public pricing — fees, setup costs, and service tiers are not disclosed anywhere
Operates within a network marketing structure; parent MLM company is unnamed and unidentified on the website
No BBB profile or accreditation, and no presence on major independent review platforms
No mobile app, client portal, or online progress tracking available
Business simultaneously recruits entrepreneurs into the same structure, creating a potential conflict of interest in consumer service delivery
best_for: Consumers working toward homeownership who want credit repair and real estate guidance from one licensed practitioner
Clients who prefer hands-on, relationship-based service over automated credit repair platforms
Charlotte-area residents who value local expertise and in-person availability
Clients comfortable discussing pricing directly before committing
diagnosis: 5 Star Credit & Financial Svcs is best suited for clients working toward homeownership who want a single practitioner handling both credit repair and real estate guidance — a genuinely rare combination backed by strong client reviews. The main caveat is the network marketing business structure: the unnamed parent MLM company and the recruitment-parallel operation are meaningful transparency gaps that warrant direct questions before signing any agreement.
services: Credit report review and negative item analysis
Credit bureau dispute filing (collections, charge-offs, bankruptcies, evictions)
Real estate buyer and seller representation (NC and SC)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
